channel.title: Journal of Political Economy - Ahead of Print
channel.description: New JPE articles posted online ahead of print (via CrossRef DOI registrations)

item.title: Silence to Solidarity: How Communication About a Minority Affects Discrimination
item.description: Authors: Duncan Webb

item.title: The Impact of Unions on Nonunion Wage Setting: Threats and Bargaining
item.description: Authors: David A. Green, Ben M. Sand, Iain G. Snoddy, Jeanne Tschopp

item.title: Regulatory Competition in the US Life Insurance Industry
item.description: Authors: Johnny Tang

item.title: Why Is Intermediating Houses So Difficult? Evidence from iBuyers
item.description: Authors: Greg Buchak, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru

item.title: Environmental Consequences of Hydrocarbon Infrastructure Policy
item.description: Authors: Thomas R Covert, Ryan Kellogg

item.title: Quota Mechanisms: Finite-Sample Optimality and Robustness
item.description: Authors: Ian Schofield Ball, Deniz Kattwinkel

item.title: Peer Effects and Rank Concerns in the Classroom
item.description: Authors: Michela Maria Tincani

item.title: Online Business Models, Digital Ads, and User Welfare
item.description: Authors: Daron Acemoglu, Daniel Huttenlocher, Asuman Ozdaglar, James Siderius

item.title: Mis(sed) Diagnosis: Physician Decision Making and ADHD
item.description: Authors: Kelli Marquardt

item.title: From Doubt to Devotion: Trials and Learning-Based Pricing
item.description: Authors: Tan Gan, Nicholas Wu

item.title: Markups: A Search-Theoretic Perspective
item.description: Authors: Guido Menzio

item.title: The Effect of Education Policy on Crime: An Intergenerational Perspective
item.description: Authors: Ulrika Ahrsjö, Costas Meghir, Marten Palme, Marieke Schnabel

item.title: Optimal Tests Following Sequential Experiments
item.description: Authors: Karun Adusumilli

item.title: Scalable Demand and Markups
item.description: Authors: Enghin Atalay, Erika Frost, Alan Sorensen, Christopher Sullivan, Wanjia Zhu
